title: Haworthiopsis × revendettii
taxonomy: Haworthiopsis × revendettii is a hybrid succulent plant. It is a cross between Haworthia fasciata and Haworthia truncata. Both of these parent species are native to South Africa, and they share similarities in their leaf shapes and growth habits. As a hybrid, Haworthiopsis × revendettii combines the characteristics of its parent species, creating a unique appearance. It is often cultivated by succulent enthusiasts due to its striking appearance and low-maintenance requirements.

The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing stress and promoting overall well-being. Bioactive constituents of Haworthiopsis × revendettii include flavonoids, anthraquinones, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
